questionHtml:
The diagram shows the three-dimensional structure of tRNA.

[Source: Structure reproduced with the kind permission of N.R. Voss.]

 

What can attach to the region marked X?

A. mRNA

B. An amino acid

C. An anticodon

D. The P site of the ribosome

meta.title: The diagram shows the three-dimensional structure of tRNA. [Source: Structure reproduced with the kind permission of N.R. Voss.] What can attach to the region marked X? A. mRNA B.
breadcrumbLabels: D1.2.7. Complementary base pairing between tRNA and mRNA
